# Implementation Plan: JugadaMax V1 Launch

**Branch**: `001-v1-launch` | **Date**: 2026-07-01 | **Spec**: [spec.md](./spec.md)

**Input**: Feature specification from `specs/001-v1-launch/spec.md`

**Note**: This plan was generated by the `/speckit-plan` workflow. The PowerShell setup helper
(`setup-plan.ps1`) could not be executed in this environment (unresponsive shell); its only side
effects — creating the feature directory and copying the plan template — were performed directly
via file tools. Agent-context refresh script was likewise skipped.

## Summary

Build the first public version of JugadaMax: a premium, mobile-first, crypto-first iGaming
affiliate/media site for Mexico (Spanish first). V1 ships a homepage, three ranked vertical
listing pages (Crypto Casinos, Fiat Casinos, Betting Sites), a reusable casino review page, a
guides/news content structure, and the required trust/compliance pages. Content is sourced from
typed, file-based data (casinos, bonuses, authors, reviews, articles) rendered by statically
generated App Router pages. No demo slots, no user accounts, no fabricated signals. SEO uses
per-route metadata plus conservative JSON-LD that deliberately avoids fake `AggregateRating`.

## Technical Context

**Language/Version**: TypeScript 5 (strict), React 19, Next.js 16.2.9 (App Router, React Server
Components).

**Primary Dependencies**: Next.js App Router, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui (radix-nova style,
already scaffolded under `components/ui`), lucide-react icons. No CMS/database in V1.

**Storage**: File-based, version-controlled content as typed TypeScript/JSON modules under
`content/` (casinos, bonuses, authors, reviews, articles). No runtime DB.

**Testing**: Type checking (`tsc --noEmit`) and lint (`eslint`) as the baseline quality gate;
manual quickstart validation per `quickstart.md`. Automated component/e2e tests are OPTIONAL and
not required by the spec.

**Target Platform**: Modern mobile and desktop browsers; statically generated pages served via
Next.js (deployment target Vercel, but deploy is gated on explicit user confirmation).

**Project Type**: Web application (frontend-only content/media site; no custom backend in V1).

**Performance Goals**: Mobile-first. Primary content readable within ~3s on a typical mobile
connection (SC-003). Prefer static generation (SSG), minimal client JS, no blocking media. Target
Lighthouse mobile Performance and SEO ≥ 90 as an internal bar.

**Constraints**: No heavy 3D, no autoplay hero video, no particle backgrounds (Constitution +
spec FR-020). Lightweight motion only. Brand palette is authoritative (FR-019). Spanish-first
content with structure ready for more LATAM locales (FR-021). No fabricated content (FR-017).
Responsive: mobile-first, tablet-safe, desktop-safe with no horizontal page overflow, contained
comparison-table scrolling, non-obscuring sticky header, and always-tappable CTAs, validated at
360/390/430/768/1024/1440px (FR-028–FR-035).

**Scale/Scope**: ~11 homepage sections; 3 ranking pages; 1 review template (N casino instances);
guides/news index + article template; ~5 trust/legal pages; a handful of shared UI components. A
few dozen content records at launch, designed to scale to hundreds without redesign.

## Constitution Check

*GATE: Must pass before Phase 0 research. Re-check after Phase 1 design.*

Constitution v1.0.0 principles evaluated against this plan:

| Principle | Gate | Status |
|-----------|------|--------|
| I. Premium Dark iGaming Media Design (NON-NEGOTIABLE) | Design system uses the authoritative palette (deep navy `#0A1931`, graphite `#111417`, gold `#FFB800`/`#FFC300`, emerald `#00A86B`, off-white `#F5F5F0`, muted `#B8B8B0`), lightweight motion only, ranking-led layouts. | PASS |
| II. Mobile-First & Speed-First | Mobile-first Tailwind, SSG, minimal client JS, no blocking media; performance treated as a gate. | PASS |
| III. Ranking & Comparison Integrity | Rankings derive from a documented methodology page; ranking order stored in data and traceable; comparison tables provided. | PASS |
| IV. Trust, Compliance & Responsible Gambling (NON-NEGOTIABLE) | Affiliate disclosure + 18+ notice rendered near every affiliate CTA via shared components; dedicated trust pages; disclosure not de-emphasized. | PASS |
| V. Authenticity — No Fabricated Signals (NON-NEGOTIABLE) | No fake winners/reviews/screenshots/social proof; JSON-LD avoids `AggregateRating`; only real editorial author-attributed ratings displayed. | PASS |
| Design & Technical Constraints | No 3D/autoplay video/particles; homepage includes all 11 required sections; palette enforced via design tokens. | PASS |
| Development Workflow & Safety | No push/deploy without confirmation; no `.env`/secret edits; no `npm audit fix --force`; plan explained before big changes; file-change summaries provided. | PASS |

No violations. Complexity Tracking table below is intentionally empty.

## Project Structure

### Documentation (this feature)

```text
specs/001-v1-launch/
├── plan.md              # This file
├── spec.md              # Feature specification
├── research.md          # Phase 0 output
├── data-model.md        # Phase 1 output
├── quickstart.md        # Phase 1 output
├── contracts/           # Phase 1 output (content/UI/SEO contracts)
│   ├── content-model.md
│   ├── ui-components.md
│   └── seo-schema.md
└── checklists/
    └── requirements.md  # Spec quality checklist (from /speckit-specify)
```

### Source Code (repository root)

App Router web application. Proposed layout (to be implemented in later phases, NOT in this plan):

```text
app/
├── layout.tsx                      # Root layout: fonts, <html lang="es-MX">, header/footer, base metadata
├── page.tsx                        # Homepage (11 sections)
├── globals.css                     # Design tokens (palette, typography, radii) + Tailwind v4 theme
├── sitemap.ts                      # Dynamic sitemap from content
├── robots.ts                       # Robots directives
├── (marketing)/                    # Route group for public content pages
│   ├── casinos-crypto/page.tsx     # Top Crypto Casinos in Mexico
│   ├── casinos-fiat/page.tsx       # Top Fiat Casinos in Mexico
│   ├── apuestas/page.tsx           # Top Betting Sites in Mexico
│   ├── reviews/[slug]/page.tsx     # Reusable casino review template
│   ├── guias/page.tsx              # Guides index
│   ├── guias/[slug]/page.tsx       # Guide article
│   ├── noticias/page.tsx           # News index
│   └── noticias/[slug]/page.tsx    # News article
└── (legal)/                        # Trust / compliance / legal route group
    ├── como-evaluamos/page.tsx     # Evaluation methodology
    ├── divulgacion-afiliados/page.tsx  # Affiliate disclosure
    ├── juego-responsable/page.tsx  # Responsible gambling (18+)
    ├── acerca-de/page.tsx          # About
    └── contacto/page.tsx           # Contact

components/
├── ui/                             # shadcn/ui primitives (already scaffolded)
├── layout/                         # SiteHeader, SiteFooter, MobileNav, container
├── ranking/                        # RankingCard, RankingList, RankBadge, RatingStars
├── comparison/                     # ComparisonTable, ComparisonRow, PaymentBadges
├── review/                         # ReviewHeader, ProsCons, VerdictBox, AuthorByline
├── trust/                          # AffiliateDisclosure, ResponsibleGamblingNotice, TrustBadge, AgeGate18
├── content/                        # ArticleCard, ArticleList, GuidesPreview, NewsPreview
└── home/                           # Hero, QuickCategories, section wrappers

content/                            # File-based, typed data (no DB)
├── casinos/                        # Casino/operator records
├── bonuses/                        # Bonus records
├── authors/                        # Author records
├── reviews/                        # Review records (MDX or typed data + body)
├── guides/                         # Guide articles (MDX)
└── news/                           # News articles (MDX)

lib/
├── content/                        # Loaders + zod-style validation for content collections
├── seo/                            # metadata builders + JSON-LD generators
├── ranking/                        # ranking/sort helpers driven by methodology weights
└── utils.ts                        # (exists) cn() helper

types/                              # Shared TS types for Casino, Bonus, Author, Review, Article, Vertical
```

**Structure Decision**: Single Next.js App Router project (Option 2 "web application", frontend
only — no separate backend is needed for a statically generated affiliate/media site). Content
lives in a version-controlled `content/` tree with typed loaders in `lib/content`, keeping the
data model future-ready (new operators/bonuses/authors/reviews are new files) while avoiding CMS
or database complexity in V1. Route groups `(marketing)` and `(legal)` separate content pages
from trust/legal pages without affecting URLs.

## Design System (mobile-first premium dark)

- **Tokens** defined as CSS variables in `app/globals.css` and mapped into the Tailwind v4 theme:
  `--jm-navy #0A1931`, `--jm-graphite #111417`, `--jm-gold #FFB800`, `--jm-gold-strong #FFC300`,
  `--jm-emerald #00A86B`, `--jm-text #F5F5F0`, `--jm-text-muted #B8B8B0`.
- **Base**: dark theme by default; navy/graphite layered backgrounds; gold reserved for primary
  CTAs and rank emphasis; emerald reserved for trust/verification badges; off-white body text.
- **Typography**: existing Geist font; large legible mobile type scale; strong hierarchy for
  ranking numbers and CTAs.
- **Motion**: lightweight transitions/hover only (opacity/transform), respecting
  `prefers-reduced-motion`. No parallax, no 3D, no autoplay video, no particles.
- **Components** built mobile-first with Tailwind, composed from shadcn/ui primitives.
- **Responsive rules** (FR-028–FR-035): mobile-first breakpoints that stay tablet- and desktop-safe;
  no horizontal page overflow (`overflow-x` confined to intentional inner scroll containers only);
  ranking cards stack/reflow cleanly on small screens; `ComparisonTable` scrolls inside its own
  wrapper; sticky header height reserved via layout padding + `scroll-margin` for anchors; CTAs keep
  adequate touch targets and no hover-only behavior; validate at 360/390/430/768/1024/1440px.

## Implementation Phases (for /speckit-tasks — not executed here)

- **Phase A — Foundation**: design tokens in `globals.css`, root layout (`lang="es-MX"`, header/
  footer), base metadata, content types in `types/`, content loaders + validation in `lib/content`.
- **Phase B — Data & content scaffolding**: seed a small set of real, non-fabricated casino,
  bonus, author, review, and article records; wire loaders and ranking helpers.
- **Phase C — Shared UI**: layout, ranking cards, comparison table, trust components (disclosure,
  18+), rating display, article cards.
- **Phase D — Ranking pages**: Crypto, Fiat, Betting listing pages with comparison tables (P1/P3).
- **Phase E — Review template**: `reviews/[slug]` with verdict, pros/cons, bonus, payments, trust,
  author byline (P2).
- **Phase F — Content structure**: guides/news indexes + article templates (P5).
- **Phase G — Trust/legal pages**: methodology, affiliate disclosure, responsible gambling (18+),
  about, contact (P2/P4).
- **Phase H — Homepage assembly**: compose all 11 required sections (depends on B–G).
- **Phase I — SEO & discovery**: per-route metadata, JSON-LD (no `AggregateRating`), `sitemap.ts`,
  `robots.ts`.
- **Phase J — Polish & performance**: accessibility, Lighthouse pass, reduced-motion, image
  optimization.

`app/page.tsx` and component creation are intentionally deferred to these phases and are NOT part
of this planning step.
